summary: Implemented floating info button and modal for US-013. Created info-button.ts (circular 'i' button with aria-label, appended to #overlay-ui), info-modal.ts (backdrop + card with show/hide API, closes via × button, backdrop click, or Escape key), and their CSS files (button positioned bottom-right with 44px touch target, modal centered with semi-transparent backdrop and CSS transitions). Wired everything together in main.ts. All 85 tests pass, lint and typecheck clean.
